# Add two voters with different log lengths.
add-voters
v1: [a1]
v2: [a1 b2]
----
v1: [a1] term=a cfg=(v1 v2 w)
v2: [a1 b2] term=b cfg=(v1 v2 w)

# v1 campaigns. v2 has a more up-to-date log, so v2 rejects.
campaign v1
----
v1 campaigns at term b
v1: yes (self)
v2: no, log not up to date (b2 > a1)
w:  yes
outcome: won

# v2 campaigns. Its log is more up-to-date, everyone votes yes.
campaign v2
----
v2 campaigns at term c
v2: yes (self)
v1: yes
w:  yes
outcome: won

# v2 campaigns again but v1's response is dropped. The witness breaks
# the tie.
campaign v2 drop=(v1)
----
v2 campaigns at term d
v2: yes (self)
v1: yes (dropped)
w:  yes
outcome: won
